comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v3.1/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

APIv2 tests: don't track each precise version bump, but to at least confirm major version
```diff
diff --git a/test/apiv2/01-basic.at b/test/apiv2/01-basic.at
index 82c31f660..a43c5659b 100644
--- a/test/apiv2/01-basic.at
+++ b/test/apiv2/01-basic.at
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@ t HEAD libpod/_ping 200
 for i in /version version; do
     t GET  $i      200                           \
       .Components[0].Name="Podman Engine"        \
-      .Components[0].Details.APIVersion=3.1.0    \
+      .Components[0].Details.APIVersion~3[0-9.-]\\+  \
       .Components[0].Details.MinAPIVersion=3.0.0 \
       .Components[0].Details.Os=linux            \
       .ApiVersion=1.40                          \
```
